name: Hari Parbat Fort
description: A massive fort situated on a prominent hill visible from almost everywhere in Srinagar. The hill is highly sacred to Hindus, Muslims, and Sikhs, featuring shrines for all three.
history: The first fortifications were built by the Afghan governor Shuja Shah Durrani in 1808. The hill houses the Sharika Peeth, Makhdoom Sahib shrine, and Gurdwara Chatti Patshahi.
famousFor: Panoramic city views, religious harmony, massive ramparts.
